hey can you tell me if the mechanics in my adofai platformer are cool
nah the vid doesn't have the gimmicks
hold on i'll tell you the gimmicks for each section
section 2 has flinging platforms (kinda like in celeste chapter 1), if you jump while riding them you go at double speed
section 4 has running water that pushes you when you're on it
section 5 is underwater, so you have infinite double jumps, and it also has currents that push you when you're in them
section 6 has sticky ceilings, so you slide on them without falling off
section 7 has gates that open with buttons, but it's on a timer
when you're on it, it sort of rotates around a point, and you fall off if you're on it for too long
basically when you go on the platform it does this https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZccEuZu7_PTnsyM9j7aM4acWw6EfhBxa/view?usp=sharing
so you can use it to go further
but if you stay too long you fall of
gotta make sure there's a little salt and sufferring in every platformer
it's more like a gimmick to play around with
an idea i had was this https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EsvmBCgsYjqgrqGeOdN1r_6RfPyIThGF/view?usp=sharing
wind will push you at half your speed
that's not exactly how it's coded
it just gives you an extra move every two frames
just so you stay aligned to your movement grid
usually wind just pushes you a specific way every frame
because we have this wonderful thing called floating point numbers
best i have is boolean variables
